What was good about today’s lesson?

answer
It was good at talking about favorite colors.
I finished my presentation.
I knew a lot of problems and thinking solution.
I could know various themes.
I could talk with my partner a lot
getting know a lot about different tpic
All the presentation were interesting and easy to understand.
I could understood a lot of problems through classmates’ presentation.
My presentation was finished.
It was interesting to hear everyone’s presentations!
Because I was able to complete the presentation I had prepared with very few mistakes.
I was able to listen to presentations on various topics.
I could listening good presentation.
I was able to learn about the issues happening all over the world through speeches.
I did my best on the presentation.
Everyone’s presentations were interesting.
There were many presentations on issues related to children, which allowed me to develop an interest in a variety of problems.
I learned different theme and issue from presentation.
I could hear about topic that would be relevant to my own research.

Because I stumbled a bit during the presentation.

I feel scared for my presentation time.
